Name: Double Caramel Frappuccino
Description: A rich and creamy blended beverage made with smooth coffee, milk, and ice, layered with double caramel sauce and topped with whipped cream. Perfect for caramel lovers who enjoy a sweet and refreshing coffee experience.

Name: White Chocolate Mocha Frappuccino
Description: A smooth blend of coffee, milk, and ice infused with creamy white chocolate flavor. Finished with whipped cream for a perfectly balanced sweet and refreshing treat.

Name: Iced Cafe Latte
Description: Freshly brewed espresso combined with chilled milk and poured over ice. A light, smooth, and refreshing classic coffee drink perfect for any time of the day.

Name: White Chocolate Mocha
Description: A warm and comforting espresso beverage blended with steamed milk and rich white chocolate sauce. Topped with whipped cream for a smooth and indulgent flavor.

Name: Iced Caramel Macchiato
Description: Layers of vanilla-flavored milk and espresso poured over ice, finished with a generous caramel drizzle. A sweet, bold, and refreshing signature drink.

Name: Hot Caramel Macchiato
Description: Freshly steamed milk marked with espresso and topped with rich caramel sauce. A warm, smooth, and comforting beverage with a perfect balance of sweetness and bold coffee flavor.

Name: Iced Matcha Latte
Description: Premium matcha green tea blended with milk and served over ice. A refreshing and lightly sweet drink packed with smooth earthy flavors.

Name: Honey Cake
Description: Soft and moist layered cake infused with natural honey flavor. A light and delicate dessert that pairs perfectly with coffee or tea.

Name: Blueberry Cheesecake
Description: Creamy cheesecake topped with a rich blueberry glaze on a buttery biscuit base. A perfect balance of sweet and tangy flavors in every bite.

Name: Glazed Donuts
Description: Soft and fluffy donuts coated with a sweet sugar glaze. A classic bakery favorite that melts in your mouth.

Name: Greek Salad
Description: A fresh mix of crisp lettuce, cucumbers, tomatoes, olives, and feta cheese, drizzled with olive oil dressing. A light and healthy Mediterranean classic.

Name: Iced Black Tea Lemonade
Description: Refreshing black tea blended with zesty lemonade and served over ice. A perfectly balanced sweet and citrusy drink.

Name: Iced London Fog Tea Latte
Description: Earl Grey tea infused with vanilla syrup and milk, served chilled over ice. A smooth and aromatic tea latte with a refreshing twist.

Name: Turkey Bacon, Cheddar & Egg White Sandwich
NormalizedName: TURKEY BACON, CHEDDAR & EGG WHITE SANDWICH
Description: A delicious breakfast sandwich made with lean turkey bacon, fluffy egg whites, and melted cheddar cheese on a toasted bun. A balanced and satisfying meal.

Name: Iced Matcha
Description: Premium green tea matcha shaken with ice for a refreshing and energizing drink. Lightly sweet with a smooth and earthy flavor.

Name: Double-Smoked Bacon, Cheddar & Egg Sandwich
Description: Savory double-smoked bacon paired with melted cheddar cheese and a fluffy egg, served on a toasted sandwich bun. A rich and hearty breakfast choice.

Name: Iced Chai Tea Latte with Oleato Golden Foam
NormalizedName: ICED CHAI TEA LATTE WITH OLEATO GOLDEN FOAM
Description: Spiced chai tea blended with milk and served over ice, topped with smooth Oleato golden foam for a creamy and unique flavor experience.

Name: Dragon Drink® Starbucks Refreshers® Beverage with Oleato Golden Foam
NormalizedName: DRAGON DRINK® STARBUCKS REFRESHERS® BEVERAGE WITH OLEATO GOLDEN FOAM
Description: A tropical blend of sweet mango and dragon fruit flavors combined with creamy coconut milk and finished with smooth Oleato golden foam. A vibrant and refreshing beverage.
